outfits.name: Infentessimal Outfit Expansion
outfits.description: An infinitely small, yet unendingly deep storage device. whenever you look inside of this strange device, its internal storage compartment morphs to mach the outfit attatchment points of your ship.

outfits.name: Infentessimal Outfit Expansion XL
outfits.description: An infinitely small, yet unendingly deep storage device. whenever you look inside of this strange device, its internal storage compartment morphs to mach the outfit attatchment points of your ship.

outfits.name: Infentessimal Cargo Expansion
outfits.description: An infinitely small, yet unendingly deep storage device. Whenever you look inside of it, it always seems to be just deep enough to where you can't reach the bottom...

outfits.name: Infentessimal Cargo Expansion XL
outfits.description: An infinitely small, yet unendingly deep storage device. Whenever you look inside of it, it always seems to be just deep enough to where you can't reach the bottom...

outfits.name: Void Mass Expansion S
outfits.description: By utilizing void technology, this expansion can condense pieces of a ship to reduce their mass by 25. Unforunetly, doing so causes quite a few heating problems.

outfits.name: Void Mass Expansion XL
outfits.description: By utilizing void technology, this expansion can condense pieces of a ship to reduce their mass by 25. Unforunetly, doing so causes quite a few heating problems.

outfits.name: Void Outfit Expansion S
outfits.description: By utilizing void technology, this expansion increases outfit space by 20 at the cost of 5 cargo space.

outfits.name: Void Outfit Expansion XL
outfits.description: By utilizing void technology, this expansion increases outfit space by 2000 at the cost of 500 cargo space.

outfits.name: Void Cargo Expansion S
outfits.description: By utilizing void technology, this expansion increases cargo space by 2000 at the cost of 500 Outfit Space. The expansion does, however, cause some heat inefficiency.

outfits.name: Void Cargo Expansion XL
outfits.description: By utilizing void technology, this expansion increases cargo space by 2000 at the cost of 500 Outfit Space. The expansion does, however, cause some heat inefficiency.

outfits.name: Void Engine Expansion S
outfits.description: By utilizing void technology, this expansion increases engine capacity by 20 at the cost of 5 Outfit Space.

outfits.name: Void Engine Expansion XL
outfits.description: By utilizing void technology, this expansion increases engine capacity by 2000 at the cost of 500 Outfit Space.

outfits.name: Void Weapon Expansion S
outfits.description: By utilizing void technology, this expansion increases weapon capacity by 20 at the cost of 5 Outfit Space.

outfits.name: Void Weapon Expansion XL
outfits.description: By utilizing void technology, this expansion increases weapon capacity by 2000 at the cost of 500 Outfit Space.
